# PERF-227 positive: zlib.NewWriterLevel without pool, even when a file-level
# GetZlibWriter pool exists (must not silence other functions). BestSpeed so
# this is pool-only (PERF-233 does not fire).
lang: go
file: PERF-227-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"compress/zlib"
	"io"
	"sync"
)

var zwPool = sync.Pool{
	New: func() any {
		w, _ := zlib.NewWriterLevel(io.Discard, zlib.BestSpeed)
		return w
	},
}

func GetZlibWriter(buf *bytes.Buffer) *zlib.Writer {
	w := zwPool.Get().(*zlib.Writer)
	w.Reset(buf)
	return w
}

func CompressPage(page []byte) []byte {
	var buf bytes.Buffer
	// Unpooled: file-level GetZlibWriter must not silence this site.
	w, err := zlib.NewWriterLevel(&buf, zlib.BestSpeed)
	if err != nil {
		return nil
	}
	_, _ = w.Write(page)
	_ = w.Close()
	return buf.Bytes()
}
